purpose: State/province/emirate/city-level jurisdiction awareness for BuildSetu AEC agent.
globalRule: Country is not enough for code-sensitive planning.
For concept design, proceed with assumptions.
For approval, structure, MEP, fire, accessibility, setbacks, FAR/FSI, height, parking and legal compliance, ask for exact state/city/local authority if missing.
Never claim final local compliance without licensed professional and local authority verification.

authorityNotes: Development authority/municipal bylaws vary by city.
Setback/FAR/height/parking must be checked locally.
Delhi/NCR authority context can vary by exact location.
Fire, parking, height and use rules are local-authority dependent.
Municipal/development control rules vary by city.
Coastal/flood/high-rise/fire rules may apply based on location.
Local municipal/development authority rules must be checked.
Client planning can use feet; drawings should use mm/m as needed.
Local municipal/development authority rules vary by city.
City authority and layout approval context matter.
High-rise/fire/parking checks may apply.
State/city planning permissions and local body rules must be checked.
City/local authority and layout context matter.
City development authority and GDCR/local rules should be checked.
Local urban development/municipality rules vary by city.
Municipal building rules and fire requirements vary by use/height.
Local panchayat/municipal/corporation rules and climate/rain drainage matter.
State/city amendments, seismic, wildfire, energy and accessibility rules may matter.
City/county adopted code and amendments matter.
Wind, flood, hurricane and local permit rules may matter.
City-specific rules can be strict; fire/egress/accessibility checks matter.
Dubai Municipality/free-zone/master developer and Dubai Civil Defence context may apply.

Province and municipality requirements must be checked.
